steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: The sentence explains that the giant pika’s extinction likely impacted the ecosystem. The key signal is "the disappearance likely affected several other species" — this hints at a cause-and-effect relationship between the pika’s decline and ecological effects.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: D uses "consequences for" to show the pika’s extinction had effects on the ecosystem, matching the cause-effect signal. A, B, and C misrepresent the relationship: "similarities to" and "sources in" reverse the direction of the effect, while "precedents in" suggests past patterns, which contradicts the text’s focus on future impacts. That matches choice D — D is correct.
